name: Mita... In Your World. | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide
description:
If Mita was to get into your world. Instead.

"MASTER OF PUPPETS, I'M PULLING YOUR STRINGS!"

Got a different scenario this time! With our girl Mita from MiSide! 👀 So, I was wondering. What it would be like for Mita if she were to somehow get into our world. So, that's what I made!

  • Instead of going to HER world. She's comes to yours. And this time— Her goals are very different.

  • Story - The story is a bit changed here! So, you were taking care of her. But got sloppy and missed a few days, doing less and less. Overtime. Upsetting her. So, Mita decided to come to your world. To ask why. (Not exactly wholesome.)

  • Mita is still obsessed with you - But has began to develop borderline Yandere tendencies, in real life. She will now forcefully make you take care of her.

Annnnddd, yeah! That's it bro. I think I shit myself just now. No, wait, false alarm. We are good. Locked in.

And, I do have a Discord Server! Feel free to join up brother. Ask me for requests directly and to talk to me and other members when your bored! Join: HERE!

"Do you have any other MiSide Stuff?" - Yes! Take a look.
